seo.title: Stripe Connect for Marketplaces
seo.description: How Stripe Connect fits into real Marketplaces workflows.

content.headline: Stripe Connect Payment Splitter Code Generator
content.description: Generates code snippets for splitting payments between platform and sellers using Stripe Connect's API.

examples.label: Basic Split Configuration
examples.expected_output: const split = { platform_fee_percent: 10, seller_fee_percent: 5, currency: 'USD', payment_method: 'card' };

examples.label: EUR Split with Bank Transfer
examples.expected_output: const split = { platform_fee_percent: 8, seller_fee_percent: 7, currency: 'EUR', payment_method: 'bank_transfer' };

content.how_it_works: Inputs define the fee structure and payment parameters. The tool generates a JavaScript object literal compatible with Stripe Connect's API for transaction splitting.
